def positive_test_re_implements_production_validation_logic():
    rule_id = "test_re_implements_production_validation_logic"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test contains a hard-coded reimplementation of production validation logic instead of invoking it."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
